items.name: Snowball
items.description: Life is like a snowball. The important thing is finding wet snow and a really long hill....

items.name: Riptide
items.description: Win Percy Jackson's legendary sword, Riptide, by playing SFOTH: Percy Jackson Sea of Monsters Edition! Catch Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters in theaters August 7.

items.name: Stravant's Lightning
items.description: Run like the wind and shoot deadly lightning beams at people. We're always having to tell him no lightning in the office...

items.name: Sword of Heartsongs
items.description: By the power of my heartsong, justice will be served!

items.name: Golden Steampunk Gloves
items.description: Swing your mighty (and heavy!) gloves at your foes. Each hit does 15 damage and launches your rivals away from you with great force.

items.name: Crescendo, The Soul Stealer
items.description: Forged with fiery flames and a demon's eye the Crescendo ascends from its ancient sleep with a thundering tone.

items.name: Darkheart
items.description: It's darker than RGB(0,0,0) and it steals life from your enemies. What more is there to say.

items.name: Heart Balloon
items.description: Let your heart soar - as high as this balloon!

items.name: Amethyst Periastron Kappa
items.description: The sword men use to fight robot lions in space.

items.name: Sword of Darkness
items.description: Dare to reach out your hand into the darkness, to pull another hand into the dark from the light.

items.name: ROBAR eXtreme Chocolate Crunch
items.description: SNAP INTO A ROBAR!

items.name: Year of the Monkey Lantern
items.description: Celebrate the year of the monkey with this awesome lantern.  The spirit of monkey will protect you!

items.name: Galactic Laser Gun
items.description: Foes from all planets will fear your wrath!

items.name: Orc Blade
items.description: Rusty yet effective sword for primitive humanoids. Has only a basic slashing attack, but does increased damage.

items.name: Pumpkin Bucket
items.description: It's in the "Horror" genre because it can hold a horrifyingly large amount of candy. Nomnomnom!

items.name: R-Orb
items.description: Charge a powerful orb and hurl it at your enemies as you fly above them.

items.name: Illumina
items.description: Telamon's favorite weapon from Sword Fight on the Heights. It is light, agile, and deadly.

items.name: Telamonster: the Chaos Edge
items.description: “The lions sing and the hills take flight. The moon by day, and the sun by night. Blind woman, deaf man, jackdaw fool. Let the Lord of Chaos rule.”

items.name: Gravity Gun
items.description: Try out the new gravity gun and make the Spacetime fabric look like your grandma’s knitted sweaters. Aim this at an object to levitate it for a short amount of time.

items.name: Dance Grenade
items.description: The roof, the roof, the roof is on fire!  The roof is on fire because you just set off this awesome dance grenade!

items.name: Flashlight
items.description: The light follows your mouse around the level to illuminate what lays hidden.

items.name: Black Hole Bomb
items.description: Instead of blowing everything apart, it pulls everything together. The consequences are pretty.

items.name: 2010 Fireworks
items.description: Always remember, ROBLOX fireworks are fun, but real fireworks are dangerous. Don't play with real fireworks unless a responsible adult is present.

items.name: Bluster Buster
items.description: Harness air power to defeat your foes!  I'm not talking about planes.

items.name: Airstrike
items.description: Your foes don't stand a chance when you call your pilot friends for reinforcements!  Use this to call a jet fighter that launches missiles at any area you designate.

items.name: Red Sparkle Time Claymore
items.description: Slash fiercely at your enemies with vengeance, dealing some massive damage; between 15 to 35 points.  Click and hold for 3 seconds to summon a red ring of enchantment that shoots rubies up around you and does 12.5 points of damage to anyone they hit.

items.name: Scython's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: Scython. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: All-Seeing Sentry
items.description: These sentries see your enemies so you don't have to!

items.name: Birthday Pinata
items.description: Definitely makes my list of top 5 birthday activities!

items.name: Call Me Cellphone
items.description: It's not a request.
